'''Herik Vorad''' was site foreman on a dig site north of [[Enceri]] where he and his team examined some odd metal, metal which turned out to be a new vein of [[Beskar/Legends|Mandalorian iron]]. He immediately sent a message to [[Goran Beviin]], as [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] was away on business.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
